data.body: 8d8e VALIDATED. Implementer (a3612ada): seam repoint in signing.py, new _opcert_signing.py (race-safe Ed25519 genesis via os.link exclusive-create), read-both wrapper verify_attestation_record, degrade path, schema updates (sign_result/verify_signature enums, SignResultOut, SignResult); lint+typecheck green; make test 5842 passed, 1 fail = PRE-EXISTING unrelated (test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module, yaml-in-venv local artifact; also fails on clean #664 base; CI passed make test on this base for #664 PS7). My independent held-out (test_opcert_keygen_heldout.py, implementer never saw): concurrent first-sign converges on ONE key (all signers observe identical key bytes; deterministic GREEN under os.link immutability) + verify-side never creates key (create_if_missing=False raises, no file). TEETH: os.link->os.replace mutation caught by race test (timing-dependent catch; committed test stable-GREEN on correct code). Committing 8d8e now, then 4214 PS8.
